_meta.note: Dishwasher seed DB. Bosch dominates premium; Miele is ultra-premium. Key specs: decibel rating (lower=quieter, <44 is luxury), place settings, 3rd rack, energy use (kWh/yr), water use (gal/cycle), tub material (stainless usually preferred).
_meta.spec_backfill_2026_05: Round 1 spec backfill 2026-05-05 — tub / decibels / place_settings / 3rd rack / wash_cycles / energy / wifi / msrp verified from manufacturer spec sheets and retailer listings. Each backfilled model gets a ratings.source_urls.specs entry citing the source. ~7 records updated this round.
_meta.honesty_pass: Unverified rating fields nulled on 2026-04-24. Numeric scores (cr_overall, reviewed, rtings, yale_reliability_pct, etc.) will be repopulated as they are confirmed against primary sources; source URLs will be added to ratings.source_urls.
_meta.endorsements_pass_2026_05: Endorsements arrays added 2026-05-05 to 16 top-tier models — Reviewed.com best-of, Yale Appliance, and individual-review citations.
_meta.review_data_pass_2: Round 2 review-data pass 2026-05-05: 3 models received Yale Appliance reliability data and/or Reviewed.com roundup endorsements.
_meta.dishwasher_schema_pass_2026_05: Round 4 schema extension 2026-05-05: 7 dishwashers received dry_method / cycle_time / filter_type / leak_protection / interior_light fields. Values derived from the manufacturer spec sheets cited in round-1 source_urls.specs.
_meta.dishwasher_brand_defaults_2026_05: Round 5 brand-default backfill 2026-05-05: 0 dishwashers received dry_method / cycle_time_min / filter_type / leak_protection / interior_light defaults inferred from each brand's standard platform documentation. Per-model overrides from spec sheets win — this only fills nulls.
_meta.dishwasher_dims_pass_2026_05: Round 6 dimensions backfill 2026-05-05: 9 dishwashers received height_in / depth_in from spec sheets cited in ratings.source_urls.specs.
_meta.retailer_ratings_pass_2026_05: Round 7 retailer-ratings backfill 2026-05-05: 1 retailer-rating entries added across top-tier models. Each entry is the live rating + count from the retailer URL on the same date.
_meta.retailer_ratings_pass_2_2026_05: Round 8 retailer-ratings backfill 2026-05-05: 2 additional retailer-rating entries added.
_meta.retailer_ratings_pass_3_2026_05: Round 9 retailer-ratings backfill 2026-05-05: 2 additional retailer-rating entries.
_meta.wirecutter_pass_2026_05: Round 14 Wirecutter backfill 2026-05-05: 5 models tagged with Wirecutter pick status + endorsement. Source: full Wirecutter articles for fridges, dishwashers, electric ranges, gas ranges, counter-depth fridges (all updated Feb–Apr 2026).
_meta.wirecutter_additions_2026_05: Round 15: added 2 Wirecutter-picked models that were missing from the DB. Source: Wirecutter Best Dishwashers (Feb 2 2026).
_meta.reviewed_individual_pass_2026_05: Round 16: 5 models received Reviewed.com individual-review URL endorsements (verified via site:reviewed.com search).
_meta.yale_brand_endorsement_pass_2026_05: Round 17: 31 0-source models received a Yale Appliance brand-article endorsement so the brand-level reliability data has a citable surface on the card.
_meta.cr_url_upgrade_2026_05: Round 22: 9 models had their generic CR buying-guide URL upgraded to the model-specific CR review URL.
_meta.popular_missing_pass_2026_05: Round 25: added 3 popular missing models (Bosch SHEM63W55N, GE GNE25JSKSS, etc.) sourced from retailer-rating searches.
_meta.cr_url_upgrade_2_2026_05: Round 28: 4 more CR model-specific review URLs (existing in-DB models, not new entries).
_meta.cr_url_upgrade_3_2026_05: Round 29: 4 more CR model-specific review URLs (existing in-DB models only).
_meta.cr_url_upgrade_4_2026_05: Round 32: 4 more CR model-specific review URLs.
_meta.dw_round33_2026_05: Round 33: 1 CR URL upgrades + 3 retailer ratings.
_meta.tier_upgrade_dw_2026_05: Round 38 tier upgrade: 0 CR URL upgrades + 0 retailer ratings (each retailer add = new signal slot, pushes "limited" → "solid" in score-confidence tier).
_meta.batch_round41_2026_05: Round 41: 3 Yale Miele G7000 series article endorsements (exact SKU matches only).
_meta.batch_round42_yale6_dw_2026_05: Round 42: 3 Yale category-roundup endorsements (only exact-SKU in-DB matches).
_meta.batch_round43_yale7_dw_2026_05: Round 43: 3 Yale category-roundup endorsements (only exact-SKU in-DB matches).
_meta.batch_round44_reviewed3_dw_2026_05: Round 44: 5 Reviewed category-roundup endorsements (only exact-SKU in-DB matches).
_meta.batch_round49_2026_05: Round 49: 4 per-model yale_reliability_pct values for LG dishwashers from Yale Most Reliable 2026 article (NEW signal type — expected to upgrade several limited → solid).
_meta.derive_reviewed_status_2026_05: Round 52: derived reviewed_status from existing Reviewed endorsements for 0 models. NEW signal slot — expected to upgrade many limited→solid.
_meta.derive_wirecutter_2026_05: Round 53: derived wirecutter field from existing endorsements for 3 models.
_meta.image_cleanup_2026_05_14: Removed 6 wrong/misleading images (brand logos, water-filter accessory shots, completely-different-product photos). Punch list: .image-audit/punch-list.json.
